positive_prompt: A photorealistic image-to-video animation from the provided image, 97 frames, 30 fps, about 3.2 seconds. Start exactly from the provided image. Preserve the original aspect ratio. Keep the young man, his curly hair, dark sunglasses, blue shirt, tie, gray waistcoat, and the carved red stone doorway with dark wall background recognizable and coherent. The first frame is already a calm fashion portrait pose. During the clip, he makes one small completed adjustment: a subtle breath, a slight lift of the chin, and a tiny head turn toward the light, then he settles back into a confident still pose by the final frames. Use very subtle cinematic camera movement: a slow stable drift with gentle parallax between the man and the carved doorway. The camera movement is minimal, elegant, and not distracting. Add subtle natural motion where visible: curls shift slightly, shirt sleeves and tie move very gently, reflections in the sunglasses change softly, and light shadows remain stable. Photorealistic, natural lighting, realistic colors, realistic physics, smooth temporal consistency, stable subject shape, calm cinematic motion.
negative_prompt: The man is not walking away, not turning around, not removing sunglasses, not raising his hands, not changing clothes, not changing identity, not leaving the doorway, crop, cropped frame, stretched image, squeezed image, aspect ratio change, missing important objects, changed composition, fast zoom, dramatic zoom, aggressive orbit, 360 orbit, shaky camera, unstable horizon, jump cut, flicker, blurry motion, motion blur artifacts, uncontrolled motion, random changes, melting objects, duplicated objects, disappearing objects, inconsistent object shape, distorted face, deformed hands, extra limbs, extra fingers, changing identity, changing clothes, extra people, changed background, unrealistic physics, rushed action, sudden pose change, incomplete action, endless motion, no final state, cartoon style, CGI look, plastic skin, text artifacts, logo distortion
